headline: AbbVie's $10.9 Billion Apogee Deal Joins a $200 Billion Pharma Spree
summary: The $135.11 per share cash offer for Apogee carries a 49% premium

headline: BoE Unveils Private Market Stress Test to Assess Systemic Risks
summary: APO, ARES, BX, KKR and JPM join the BoE first private-market stress test to gauge whether a severe global downturn could expose wider risks.
